'''旧暦3月2日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[695年]]_月_日） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す * （[[1336年]]_月_日） - 多々良浜の戦い。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[1840年]]_月_日） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山影元|遠山左衛門尉影元]]（通称・金四郎）が北町奉行に着任
== 誕生日 == * [[天徳]]3年（[[959年]]_月_日） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * （[[1338年]]_月_日） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（[[1791年]]_月_日） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（[[1179年]]_月_日） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * （[[1392年]]_月_日） - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月1日 (旧暦)|3月1日]] 翌日[[3月3日 (旧暦)|3月3日]] - 前月[[2月2日 (旧暦)|2月2日]] 翌月[[4月2日 (旧暦)|4月2日]] *新暦[[3月2日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦3月2日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。 {{msg:旧暦3月}}
== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[695年]]_月_日） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す * （[[1336年]]_月_日） - 多々良浜の戦い。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山影元|遠山左衛門尉影元]]（通称・金四郎）が北町奉行に着任
== 誕生日 == * [[天徳]]3年（[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（[[1179年]]_月_日） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（[[1392年]][[3月25日]]） - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月1日 (旧暦)|3月1日]] 翌日[[3月3日 (旧暦)|3月3日]] - 前月[[2月2日 (旧暦)|2月2日]] 翌月[[4月2日 (旧暦)|4月2日]] *新暦[[3月2日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月1日 (旧暦)|3月1日]] 翌日[[3月3日 (旧暦)|3月3日]] - 前月[[2月2日 (旧暦)|2月2日]] 翌月[[4月2日 (旧暦)|4月2日]] *新暦[[3月2日]]

== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]{{要出典|date=2021-03}}、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月2日'''（きゅうれきさんがつふつか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。

== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[695年]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]元年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月2日'''（きゅうれきさんがつふつか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[695年]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]元年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月2日'''（きゅうれきさんがつふつか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[695年]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]元年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月2日'''（きゅうれきさんがつふつか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[695年]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]元年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[695年]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]元年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任

== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）

revision.text:
{{Lunar March}} '''March 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 2'''<!--Lunar March2れきさんがつふつか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[695年]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]元年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== Deaths == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:仏滅]] to [[Category:Butsumetsu]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
Removing from [[Category:New pages most likely u]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding korean to all the dates
Text replacement - "[[ユリウス暦]]" to "[[Julian Calendar]]"
Text replacement - "[[グレゴリオ暦]]" to "[[Gregorian Calendar]]"
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:March 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[Julian Calendar]][[695]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1840]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861]]）
== Deaths == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557]]?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[Julian Calendar]][[695]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1840]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861]]）
== Deaths == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557]]?）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[持統天皇]]9th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[695]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1336]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1840]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[959]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1338]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]]） * [[寛政]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1791]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861]]）
== Deaths == * [[治承]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1179]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9th year（ユリウス暦[[1392]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329]]） * [[天正]]10th year（ユリウス暦[[1582]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557]]?）
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * [[持統天皇]]9th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[695]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1336]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1840]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[959]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1338]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]]） * [[Kansei]]3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1791]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861]]）
== Deaths == * [[治承]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1179]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1392]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329]]） * [[天正]]10th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1582]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557]]?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

[[sn:March 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[持統天皇]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[4月19日]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[4月13日]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[4月4日]] ） - [[水野忠邦]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[4月12日]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[天皇]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[3月23日]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[4月4日]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[4月10日]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、僧侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[元中]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[3月25日]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、[[武将]] ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[3月25日]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[持統天皇]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[4月19日]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[4月13日]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[4月4日]] ） - [[水野忠邦]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任

== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[4月10日]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、僧侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[元中]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[3月25日]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、[[武将]] ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[3月25日]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1557]] ?）

[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[持統天皇]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} qqth year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[水野忠邦]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[天皇]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[qq79]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、僧侶（* [[qq43]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[元中]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、[[武将]] ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages to be translated]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[持統天皇]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[水野忠邦]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[天皇]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、僧侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[元中]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、[[武将]] ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[持統天皇]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[水野忠邦]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[天皇]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、僧侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[元中]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[持統天皇]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[水野忠邦]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、僧侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[水野忠邦]]" to "[[Mizuno Tadakuni]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[Ashikaga Takauji]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[Mizuno Tadakuni]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、Monk侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[Ashikaga Takauji]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[Mizuno Tadakuni]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、Monk侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[Ashikaga Takauji]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[Mizuno Tadakuni]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、Monk侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3年/[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations == == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[Ashikaga Takauji]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[Mizuno Tadakuni]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、Monk侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3rd year /[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] [[zh:三月初二]] [[en:draft:March 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[Ashikaga Takauji]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[Mizuno Tadakuni]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、Monk侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3rd year /[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[Ashikaga Takauji]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[Mizuno Tadakuni]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、Monk侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3rd year /[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Deprecated s front]] I guess tryiing to remove both at once like that just brought this one back? using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[695]] [[April 19]] ） - [[新羅]] の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[April 13]] ） - [[多々良浜の戦い]] 。京都を追われた[[Ashikaga Takauji]] が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[April 4]] ） - [[Mizuno Tadakuni]] の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]] が[[町奉行|北町奉行]] に着任
== Births == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[959]] [[April 12]] ） - [[円融天皇]] 、64代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[991]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[March 23]] ） - [[後光厳天皇]] 、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[April 4]] ） - [[安積艮斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} （+ [[1861]] ）
== Deaths == * [[治承]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1179]] [[April 10]] ） - [[俊寛]] 、Monk侶（* [[1143]] ） * [[明徳]] 3rd year /[[Genchū]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1392]] [[March 25]] ) - [[細川頼之]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} ・[[管領]] （* [[1329]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1582]] [[March 25]] ） - [[仁科盛信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} （* [[1557]] ?）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[695]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – An emissary from Silla was sent to Japan by the Silla king. <ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03}}</ref> * [[Engen]] 1st year/[[Kenmu]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日}}) – In the battle of Tatarahama, after being driven out of Kyoto, {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatarahama and advanced eastward. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1840]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – Under the appointment of {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|水野忠邦}}, the office of Kanjō Bugyō was assumed by the new appointee, who became the Kitamachi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[959]] {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}}) – {{ill|Enyū Tennō|ja|円融天皇}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[991]]). * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Kenmu]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1338]] {{ill|March 23|ja|3月23日}}) – {{ill|Go-Kōgen Tennō|ja|後光厳天皇}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[1374]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1791]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Anseki Gensan|ja|安積艮斎}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1179]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Shunkwan|ja|俊寛}}, a monk (died [[1143]]). * [[Meitoku]] 3rd year /[[Genchū]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1392]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yorinobu|ja|細川頼之}}, a military commander and official (born [[1329]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1582]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日}}) – {{ill|Ninashina Morinobu|ja|仁科盛信}}, a military commander (born [[1557]] ?).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[695]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – In this year, the king of 【新羅】 sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03}}</ref> * [[Engen]] 1st year / [[Kenmu]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日}}) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1840]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – Under the appointment of {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|水野忠邦}}, the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[959]] {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Enyū|ja|円融天皇}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[991]]). * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[Engen]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1338]] {{ill|March 23|ja|3月23日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Gōgen|ja|後光厳天皇}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[1374]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1791]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1179]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Shunkwan|ja|俊寛}}, a monk (died [[1143]]). * [[Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[Genchū]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1392]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|ja|細川頼之}}, a military commander and official (died [[1329]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1582]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日}}) – {{ill|Ninashi Morinobu|ja|仁科盛信}}, a military commander (died [[1557]]?).

== Events == * [[Empress Jitō]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[695]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – In this year, the king of 【新羅】 sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03}}</ref> * [[Engen]] 1st year / [[Kenmu]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日}}) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1840]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – Under the appointment of {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|水野忠邦}}, the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[959]] {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Enyū|ja|円融天皇}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[991]]). * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[Engen]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1338]] {{ill|March 23|ja|3月23日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Gōgen|ja|後光厳天皇}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[1374]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1791]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1179]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Shunkwan|ja|俊寛}}, a monk (died [[1143]]). * [[Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[Genchū]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1392]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|ja|細川頼之}}, a military commander and official (died [[1329]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1582]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日}}) – {{ill|Ninashi Morinobu|ja|仁科盛信}}, a military commander (died [[1557]]?).

== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[959]] {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Enyū|ja|円融天皇|12=draft}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[991]]). * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[Engen]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1338]] {{ill|March 23|ja|3月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Gōgen|ja|後光厳天皇|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[1374]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1791]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=draft}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1179]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shunkwan|ja|俊寛|12=draft}}, a monk (died [[1143]]). * [[Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[Genchū]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1392]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|ja|細川頼之|12=draft}}, a military commander and official (died [[1329]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1582]] {{ill|March 25|ja|3月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ninashi Morinobu|ja|仁科盛信|12=draft}}, a military commander (died [[1557]]?).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月2日'''（きゅうれきさんがつふつか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[持統天皇]]9年（[[ユリウス暦]][[695年]][[4月19日]]） - [[新羅]]の王が日本に使節として王子を遣す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[延元]]元年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[4月13日]]） - [[多々良浜の戦い]]。京都を追われた[[足利尊氏]]が筑前多々良浜で菊池武敏を破り再度東上 * [[天保]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[4月4日]]） - [[水野忠邦]]の抜擢により勘定奉行・[[遠山景元]]が[[町奉行|北町奉行]]に着任
== 誕生日 == * [[天徳 (日本)|天徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[959年]][[4月12日]]） - [[円融天皇]]、64代[[天皇]]（+ [[991年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[3月23日]]） - [[後光厳天皇]]、北朝4代天皇（+ [[1374年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[4月4日]]） - [[安積艮斎]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1861年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[治承]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1179年]][[4月10日]]） - [[俊寛]]、僧侶（* [[1143年]]） * [[明徳]]3年/[[元中]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1392年]][[3月25日]]) - [[細川頼之]]、[[武将]]・[[管領]]（* [[1329年]]） * [[天正]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1582年]][[3月25日]]） - [[仁科盛信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1557年]]?）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838918]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 2|qq=March 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:695|695]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – In this year, the king of [[:en:Silla|Silla]] sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 1st year / [[:en:Kenmu|Kenmu]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – Under the appointment of [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]], the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|qq=|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:695|695]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – In this year, the king of [[:en:Silla|Silla]] sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 1st year / [[:en:Kenmu|Kenmu]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – Under the appointment of [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]], the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|qq=|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:695|695]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – In this year, the king of [[:en:Silla|Silla]] sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 1st year / [[:en:Kenmu|Kenmu]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – Under the appointment of [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]], the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|qq=|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).

== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838918]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 2|qq=March 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:695|695]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – In this year, the king of [[:en:Silla|Silla]] sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 1st year / [[:en:Kenmu|Kenmu]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – Under the appointment of [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]], the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]]
{{translated page|ja|3月2日 (旧暦)|version=83370956|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 3월 2일]] [[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初二]]
[[ar:March 2 (Lunisolar)]]

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初二]] {{wikidata link|Q838918}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838918]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 2|qq=March 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:695|695]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – In this year, the king of [[:en:Silla|Silla]] sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 1st year / [[:en:Kenmu|Kenmu]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – Under the appointment of [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]], the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302|qq=}}

== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838918]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 2|qq=March 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:695|695]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – In this year, the king of [[:en:Silla|Silla]] sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 1st year / [[:en:Kenmu|Kenmu]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – Under the appointment of [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]], the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).

== Events == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:695|695]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – In this year, the king of [[:en:Silla|Silla]] sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 1st year / [[:en:Kenmu|Kenmu]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]] defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – Under the appointment of [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]], the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:959|959]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor En'yū|Emperor Enyū]], the 64th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:991|991]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:March 23|March 23]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōgen]], the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died [[:en:1374|1374]]). * [[:en:Kannin|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1861|1861]]).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1179|1179]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Shunkan|Shunkwan]], a monk (died [[:en:1143|1143]]). * [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Hosokawa Yoriyuki|Hosokawa Yoriyuki]], a military commander and official (died [[:en:1329|1329]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:March 25|March 25]]) – [[:en:Nishina Morinobu|Ninashi Morinobu]], a military commander (died [[:en:1557|1557]]?).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|695|en|695|WD=Q23484|lt=695}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – In this year, the king of {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla}} sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|WD=Q1194159|lt=Engen}} 1st year / {{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|WD=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13}}) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|WD=Q2508|lt=April 4}}) – Under the appointment of {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|WD=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni}}, the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
