{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|695|en|695|WD=Q23484|lt=695}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – In this year, the king of {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla}} sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|WD=Q1194159|lt=Engen}} 1st year / {{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|WD=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13}}) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|WD=Q2508|lt=April 4}}) – Under the appointment of {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|WD=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni}}, the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|959|en|959|WD=Q23750|lt=959}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|WD=Q374104|lt=Emperor Enyū}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|991|en|991|WD=Q24097|lt=991}}). * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō}} 1st year / {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|WD=Q1194159|lt=Engen}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1338|en|1338|WD=Q6044|lt=1338}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|WD=Q2445|lt=March 23}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōgon|en|Emperor Go-Kōgon|WD=Q555465|lt=Emperor Gōgen}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died {{ill|1374|en|1374|WD=Q6269|lt=1374}}). * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|WD=Q1193951|lt=Kansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1791|en|1791|WD=Q7784|lt=1791}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|WD=Q2508|lt=April 4}}) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861}}).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1179|en|1179|WD=Q19698|lt=1179}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|WD=Q2502|lt=April 10}}) – {{ill|Shunkan|en|Shunkan|WD=Q73539|lt=Shunkwan}}, a monk (died {{ill|1143|en|1143|WD=Q19617|lt=1143}}). * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|WD=Q1146236|lt=Genchū}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1392|en|1392|WD=Q6382|lt=1392}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|WD=Q2454|lt=March 25}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|en|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|WD=Q1139739|lt=Hosokawa Yoriyuki}}, a military commander and official (died {{ill|1329|en|1329|WD=Q5894|lt=1329}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|WD=Q2454|lt=March 25}}) – {{ill|Nishina Morinobu|en|Nishina Morinobu|WD=Q4168137|lt=Ninashi Morinobu}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557}}?).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|1|3|3|2|2|4|3|0302|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初二]][[zh:三月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 2|qq=March 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|695|en|695|WD=Q23484|lt=695}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – In this year, the king of {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla}} sent a prince as an envoy to Japan.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|WD=Q1194159|lt=Engen}} 1st year / {{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|WD=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13}}) – In the battle of Tatara-hama, after being chased from Kyoto, {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Chikuzen Tatara-hama and resumed his eastward advance. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|WD=Q2508|lt=April 4}}) – Under the appointment of {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|WD=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni}}, the office of the Kanjō Bugyō was transferred to the position of the Kita-machi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|959|en|959|WD=Q23750|lt=959}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|WD=Q374104|lt=Emperor Enyū}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|991|en|991|WD=Q24097|lt=991}}). * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō}} 1st year / {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|WD=Q1194159|lt=Engen}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1338|en|1338|WD=Q6044|lt=1338}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|WD=Q2445|lt=March 23}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōgon|en|Emperor Go-Kōgon|WD=Q555465|lt=Emperor Gōgen}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died {{ill|1374|en|1374|WD=Q6269|lt=1374}}). * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|WD=Q1193951|lt=Kansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1791|en|1791|WD=Q7784|lt=1791}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|WD=Q2508|lt=April 4}}) – {{ill|Ansekong Saensai|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansekong Saensai|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861}}).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1179|en|1179|WD=Q19698|lt=1179}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|WD=Q2502|lt=April 10}}) – {{ill|Shunkan|en|Shunkan|WD=Q73539|lt=Shunkwan}}, a monk (died {{ill|1143|en|1143|WD=Q19617|lt=1143}}). * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|WD=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|WD=Q1146236|lt=Genchū}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1392|en|1392|WD=Q6382|lt=1392}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|WD=Q2454|lt=March 25}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|en|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|WD=Q1139739|lt=Hosokawa Yoriyuki}}, a military commander and official (died {{ill|1329|en|1329|WD=Q5894|lt=1329}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|WD=Q2454|lt=March 25}}) – {{ill|Nishina Morinobu|en|Nishina Morinobu|WD=Q4168137|lt=Ninashi Morinobu}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557}}?).
